creator: tkato432@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Thomas Zander from comment #3)
> - Shouldn't this work on amd64 as well?

Unfortunately, at least NASM part doesn's support 64-bit arch as far as
I can see.

> - I briefly checked out the homepage. Looks like this emulator is actively
> developed and newer versions are available. Do newer versions cause problems
> on FreeBSD?

Unfortunately, it seems upstream has already discontinued preparing
source tarballs for recent versions.
